query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue,
  c.name as customerName, c.externalId as customerId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId) as billingItemCount,
  (SELECT SUM(bi.lineAmount) FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId) as billingItemTotal
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue = 0
  AND (s.status IS NULL OR s.status = 'active')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND s.customerExternalId != ''
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 50;

  c.name as customerName, c.externalId as customerId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId) as billingItemCount,
  (SELECT SUM(bi.lineAmount) FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId) as billingItemTotal
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue = 0
  AND (s.status IS NULL OR s.status = 'active')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND s.customerExternalId != ''
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 50;
